violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the hotdog roller were observed with an accumulation of brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Hot dog roller to be cleaned and sanitized prior to use New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The floor at bar is in poor repair. Floor needs to be smooth and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor shall be repaired with a material that is nonabsorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2023

The flooring at bar area in the is in poor repair. Entire floor needs to be smooth and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor shall be repaired with a material that is nonabsorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2023
